sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Verse1
Lamdang lua aw lamdang lua sa'ng liangvai kei aa ding in,
Dahna khitui hong nulsiang ta, nuamna vive dim ta,
Hongitna tel sem sem leng, nuamna khitui hong luang,
Leitung hauhna sang manpha zaw, nopna kei aa hita.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: AwZeisu a Khasiangtho hongleng Zeisu,
Innkuan sung hong om ciang,
Nu leh Pa'n zong lasa khawmta, tate zong honglam ta,
Ih innkuan in lasa khawm leng, Buaina lah om nawn lo.
Verse2
Kitot kisel na om nawnlo, nuamna vive dimta,
Nu Pa kalzong hongnuam sem sem, khasung ah bual
khawm leng
Tu leh ta te masuan in, biak inn lampai khawm ta,
Kiten kum lah hong tam sem sem. ngaih meel lah hoin sem sem.
Verse3.
Thangvan Laukhasiangtho hong leng, Kawigam hong
phong dingin
Vangliatna dim itna khut tawh, tuai lai teng hongmanta,
Enven hialai khangnote Biak innah hong laam.
Hunkhat lai a a mangthangsa ih tate ai ve leh.
